lineage.Process: CopyFeatures tm_stops_lyr "C:\Users\reule\OneDrive - University of Idaho\Uidaho Spring 2026\AccessPortland\02_Processing\AccessPortland.gdb\TM_Stops_Joined" # # # #
AddField "C:\Users\reule\OneDrive - University of Idaho\Uidaho Spring 2026\AccessPortland\02_Processing\AccessPortland.gdb\TM_Stops_Joined" access_cat TEXT # # 20 # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #

Project "C:\Users\reule\OneDrive - University of Idaho\Uidaho Spring 2026\AccessPortland\02_Processing\AccessPortland.gdb\TM_Stops_Joined" "C:\Users\reule\OneDrive - University of Idaho\Uidaho Spring 2026\AccessPortland\02_Processing\AccessPortland.gdb\TM_Stops_Projected" PROJCS["NAD_1983_StatePlane_Oregon_North_FIPS_3601_Feet_Intl",GEOGCS["GCS_North_American_1983",DATUM["D_North_American_1983",SPHEROID["GRS_1980",6378137.0,298.257222101]],PRIMEM["Greenwich",0.0],UNIT["Degree",0.0174532925199433]],PROJECTION["Lambert_Conformal_Conic"],PARAMETER["False_Easting",8202099.737532808],PARAMETER["False_Northing",0.0],PARAMETER["Central_Meridian",-120.5],PARAMETER["Standard_Parallel_1",44.33333333333334],PARAMETER["Standard_Parallel_2",46.0],PARAMETER["Latitude_Of_Origin",43.66666666666666],UNIT["Foot",0.3048]] 'NAD_1983_HARN_To_WGS_1984_2 + WGS_1984_(ITRF00)_To_NAD_1983' PROJCS["NAD_1983_HARN_StatePlane_Oregon_North_FIPS_3601_Feet_Intl",GEOGCS["GCS_North_American_1983_HARN",DATUM["D_North_American_1983_HARN",SPHEROID["GRS_1980",6378137.0,298.257222101]],PRIMEM["Greenwich",0.0],UNIT["Degree",0.0174532925199433]],PROJECTION["Lambert_Conformal_Conic"],PARAMETER["False_Easting",8202099.737532808],PARAMETER["False_Northing",0.0],PARAMETER["Central_Meridian",-120.5],PARAMETER["Standard_Parallel_1",44.33333333333334],PARAMETER["Standard_Parallel_2",46.0],PARAMETER["Latitude_Of_Origin",43.66666666666666],UNIT["Foot",0.3048]] NO_PRESERVE_SHAPE # NO_VERTICAL

Clip "C:\Users\reule\OneDrive - University of Idaho\Uidaho Spring 2026\AccessPortland\02_Processing\AccessPortland.gdb\TM_Stops_Projected" "C:\Users\reule\OneDrive - University of Idaho\Uidaho Spring 2026\AccessPortland\01_RawData\Neighborhood_Boundaries.shp" "C:\Users\reule\OneDrive - University of Idaho\Uidaho Spring 2026\AccessPortland\02_Processing\AccessPortland.gdb\Stops_Portland" #

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.
